data.body: B2 wiring note from B1 part-2 code review: when B2 authors the plan-review workflow, the batch step criteria must NOT include ISF (it is fed the linked session log by run_pass1 itself; the runner now skips it defensively) and the workflow when: clauses must replicate route_criteria applies() proportionate-scrutiny so the included set matches the bespoke path. Also: run_pass1 RE-RAISES LLMUnavailableError (systemic outage); the bespoke run_review catches it and degrades to an unsigned INDETERMINATE verdict. B2 must place the INDETERMINATE/degradation handling in the workflow (e.g. the decide step or a wrapper), since the batch step itself fails-closed on a systemic outage.
